featureName: Sprint 4 — Comprehensive Feature Regression Test Suite
description: Build a full regression test suite covering every feature in the app. Each user story creates unit tests and widget tests for a specific module. All tests must pass with `flutter test`. Tests should mock Firebase dependencies and verify models, repositories, providers, screens, and navigation work correctly. No existing functionality should be broken.

userStories.title: Model Serialization & Validation Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify that all Freezed models serialize/deserialize correctly and their extensions work as expected.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/models/ directory with test files for each model
UserModel: test fromJson/toJson roundtrip with all fields populated
UserModel: test fromJson with minimal fields (only uid, phone)
UserModel: test UserModelExt.isProvider, isPoster, isSingPassVerified, coverPhoto, completeness
UserModel: test UserRole enum values and display labels
UserModel: test ProviderStats defaults (0 completedTasks, 0.0 avgRating, etc.)
UserModel: test ProfilePhoto and CategoryShowcase fromJson/toJson
UserModel: test VerificationBadge label and emoji extensions
TaskModel: test fromJson/toJson roundtrip with all fields
TaskModel: test fromJson with minimal required fields (id, posterId, title, description, categoryId, locationLabel, budgetMin, urgency)
TaskModel: test TaskModelExt.isOpen, isAssigned, isCompleted, budgetDisplay, urgencyDisplay
TaskModel: test budgetDisplay formats as 'S$X' for single and 'S$X – S$Y' for range
TaskModel: test TaskStatus and TaskUrgency enum values
TaskModel: test GeoPoint2 fromJson/toJson
BidModel: test fromJson/toJson roundtrip, test BidStatus enum
BidModel: test default status is BidStatus.pending
ChatModel: test fromJson/toJson, test participants list
MessageModel: test fromJson/toJson, test isRead default false
ReviewModel: test fromJson/toJson, test skillEndorsements default empty list
All tests pass with `flutter test test/models/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Auth Repository & Provider Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the authentication flow logic including phone OTP, user document CRUD, and auth state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/auth/ directory with test files
Mock FirebaseAuth and FirebaseFirestore using mockito or manual fakes
Test AuthRepository.sendOtp calls verifyPhoneNumber and returns verificationId
Test AuthRepository.verifyOtp calls signInWithCredential with correct params
Test AuthRepository.createOrUpdateUser writes user doc to Firestore users collection
Test AuthRepository.fetchCurrentUser reads from Firestore and returns UserModel
Test AuthRepository.watchCurrentUser returns a Stream<UserModel?>
Test AuthRepository.signOut calls FirebaseAuth.signOut
Test PhoneAuthNotifier initial state: isLoading=false, error=null, verificationId=null, otpSent=false
Test PhoneAuthNotifier.sendOtp sets isLoading=true then otpSent=true on success
Test PhoneAuthNotifier.sendOtp sets error on failure
Test PhoneAuthNotifier.verifyOtp returns true on success, false on failure
Test PhoneAuthNotifier.reset returns to initial state
All tests pass with `flutter test test/auth/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Task Repository & Provider Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify task CRUD operations, status transitions, and the task list pagination provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/tasks/ directory with test files
Mock FirebaseFirestore and FirebaseStorage
Test TaskRepository.createTask writes task doc to Firestore and returns taskId
Test TaskRepository.createTask with photos uploads to Storage then saves URLs
Test TaskRepository.watchOpenTasks returns Stream of open tasks, respects categoryId filter
Test TaskRepository.watchMyPostedTasks filters by posterId
Test TaskRepository.updateStatus changes task status in Firestore
Test TaskRepository.completeTask sets status=completed and completedAt timestamp
Test TaskRepository.assignProvider sets assignedProviderId and assignedProviderName
Test TaskRepository.incrementViewCount increments viewCount by 1
Test TaskListNotifier initial state: empty tasks, isLoading=true, hasMore=true
Test TaskListNotifier.selectCategory updates selectedCategoryProvider and refreshes
Test TaskListNotifier.refresh resets state and reloads
Test TaskListState.copyWith works correctly
All tests pass with `flutter test test/tasks/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Bid Repository Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify bid submission, acceptance, rejection, and the bid stream works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/bids/ directory with test files
Mock FirebaseFirestore
Test BidRepository.submitBid writes bid doc to tasks/{taskId}/bids subcollection
Test BidRepository.submitBid increments task bidCount
Test BidRepository.getBidsStream returns Stream<List<BidModel>> ordered by createdAt
Test BidRepository.acceptBid: sets bid status=accepted, sets other pending bids to rejected
Test BidRepository.acceptBid: updates task assignedProviderId, assignedProviderName, status=assigned
Test BidRepository.rejectBid sets bid status=rejected
Test that bid cannot be accepted if task is not open (status validation)
All tests pass with `flutter test test/bids/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Chat Repository Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify chat creation, message sending, and real-time streams work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/chat/ directory with test files
Mock FirebaseFirestore and FirebaseStorage
Test ChatRepository.buildChatId produces deterministic ID from sorted UIDs
Test ChatRepository.buildChatId('task1', 'userA', 'userB') == buildChatId('task1', 'userB', 'userA')
Test ChatRepository.createOrGetChat creates new chat doc if not exists
Test ChatRepository.createOrGetChat returns existing chatId if chat already exists
Test ChatRepository.sendMessage writes message to chats/{chatId}/messages subcollection
Test ChatRepository.sendMessage updates lastMessage, lastMessageTime on chat doc
Test ChatRepository.getChatsStream returns Stream<List<ChatModel>> for given userId
Test ChatRepository.getMessagesStream returns Stream<List<MessageModel>> ordered by timestamp
Test ChatRepository.uploadChatImage uploads file and returns download URL
All tests pass with `flutter test test/chat/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Profile Repository Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify profile CRUD, photo gallery management, showcase updates, and skill tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/profile/ directory with test files
Mock FirebaseFirestore and FirebaseStorage
Test ProfileRepository.watchProfile returns Stream<UserModel?> for given uid
Test ProfileRepository.fetchProfile reads and returns UserModel from Firestore
Test ProfileRepository.updateProfile writes updated fields to Firestore
Test ProfileRepository.uploadAvatar uploads file to profile_photos/{uid}/ and returns URL
Test ProfileRepository.uploadGalleryPhoto creates ProfilePhoto and uploads image
Test ProfileRepository.addGalleryPhoto appends photo to user's photos array
Test ProfileRepository.removeGalleryPhoto removes photo from array and deletes from Storage
Test ProfileRepository.updatePhotosArray replaces entire photos array
Test ProfileRepository.updateShowcase updates categoryShowcases in user doc
Test ProfileRepository.addSkillTag appends tag to skillTags array
Test ProfileRepository.removeSkillTag removes tag from skillTags array
Test ProfileRepository.watchReviews returns Stream<List<ReviewModel>> with limit
Test ProfileRepository.addProviderReply sets providerReply on review doc
All tests pass with `flutter test test/profile/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Core Constants & Category Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify app constants, route definitions, and service category data are correct and complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/core/ directory with test files
Test AppConstants values: appName='NeighbourGo', platformFeePercent=13.0, currency='SGD', pageSize=20
Test AppConstants media limits: maxProfilePhotos=12, maxTaskPhotos=6
Test AppConstants Firestore collection names are correct strings
Test AppConstants storage paths are correct strings
Test AppRoutes: all route strings are valid paths starting with '/'
Test AppRoutes: taskDetail contains ':taskId' parameter
Test AppRoutes: chatThread contains ':chatId' parameter
Test AppRoutes: publicProfile contains ':userId' parameter
Test AppCategories.all has exactly 10 categories
Test AppCategories.all: each category has non-empty id, label, emoji, color
Test AppCategories.getById returns correct category for valid ID
Test AppCategories.getById returns null for invalid ID
Test category IDs are unique (no duplicates)
Test all 10 categories: cleaning, tutoring, pet_care, errands, queue_standing, handyman, moving, personal_care, admin_digital, event_help
All tests pass with `flutter test test/core/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Widget Tests — Auth Screens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need widget tests for the authentication flow screens to ensure UI renders correctly and user interactions work.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/widgets/ directory with auth widget test files
Use ProviderScope with overrides to mock all Firebase-dependent providers
Test WelcomeScreen: renders app logo, title 'NeighbourGo', Get Started button, Dev Login button
Test WelcomeScreen: Dev Login button exists and is tappable
Test WelcomeScreen: category pills display (Cleaning, Tuition, Pet Care, etc.)
Test RoleSelectionScreen: renders 3 role cards (poster, provider, both)
Test RoleSelectionScreen: tapping a card selects it (visual feedback)
Test RoleSelectionScreen: Continue button disabled until role selected
Test ProfileSetupScreen: renders Display Name field, Headline field, Bio field, Neighbourhood dropdown
Test ProfileSetupScreen: Display Name is required (shows error when empty and submitted)
Test ProfileSetupScreen: Skip for now button is visible
Test PhoneAuthScreen: renders phone input field and Send OTP button
Test PhoneAuthScreen: empty phone shows validation error on submit
Test OtpScreen: renders Pinput widget for 6 digits and Verify button
All tests pass with `flutter test test/widgets/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Widget Tests — Task Screens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need widget tests for task posting, task list, and task detail screens.

Use ProviderScope with overrides to mock task providers and repositories
Test TaskListScreen: renders 'Discover Tasks' title in AppBar
Test TaskListScreen: renders category filter chips including 'All' chip
Test TaskListScreen: shows empty state widget when no tasks
Test TaskListScreen: shows loading indicator while fetching
Test PostTaskScreen: renders step 1 with category grid (10 categories)
Test PostTaskScreen: category cards show emoji and label
Test PostTaskScreen: Next button exists at bottom
Test TaskDetailScreen: renders task title, description, budget when given valid task data
Test TaskDetailScreen: shows 'Submit Bid' button for provider role user
Test TaskDetailScreen: shows 'Mark as Complete' button for poster role user when task is assigned/inProgress
Test TaskDetailScreen: shows BidListSection for poster role user
All tests pass with `flutter test test/widgets/`
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Widget Tests — Profile, Chat & Navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need widget tests for profile screens, chat screens, and the main navigation shell.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test files under test/widgets/ for profile, chat, and navigation
Use ProviderScope with overrides to mock all providers
Test ProfileScreen: renders 'Profile' title, avatar section, display name
Test ProfileScreen: renders menu items (Edit Profile, Verification Centre, Photo Gallery, Sign Out)
Test ProfileScreen: renders current role section with Change Role button
Test EditProfileScreen: renders Display Name, Headline, Bio fields pre-filled with user data
Test EditProfileScreen: renders Service Categories as FilterChips
Test EditProfileScreen: Save button exists in AppBar
Test ChatListScreen: renders 'Messages' title in AppBar
Test ChatListScreen: shows empty state when no chats
Test ChatThreadScreen: renders message input field and send button at bottom
Test ChatThreadScreen: shows empty state when no messages
Test MainShellScreen: renders bottom navigation bar with 5 items
Test MainShellScreen: bottom nav includes Home, Discover, Post, Messages, Profile icons
Test MainShellScreen: FAB (Post Task) button renders with gradient
Test HomeScreen: renders PosterHomeScreen for poster role user
Test HomeScreen: renders ProviderHomeScreen for provider role user
Test HomeScreen: renders TabBar with 'Find Help' and 'Find Work' tabs for 'both' role user

userStories.title: Flutter Analyze Clean & Full Test Suite Green
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the entire test suite to pass and the codebase to be clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `flutter analyze` — must show 0 errors
Run `flutter test` — ALL tests must pass (0 failures)
Total test count must be >= 80 individual test cases across all test files
No skipped tests (all tests must be active)
Fix any existing code issues discovered during test writing (e.g., missing null checks, type errors)
All test files follow consistent structure: group() for organization, descriptive test names
Test directory structure is clean: test/models/, test/auth/, test/tasks/, test/bids/, test/chat/, test/profile/, test/core/, test/widgets/
